title: Cream Cheese and Honey
ingredients: ½ cup of cream cheese, at room temperature
instructions: Step 1. Place the Zambos Original Plantain Chips on a plate or tray to share.
Step 2. Soften the cream cheese by mixing it lightly until it has a creamy, spreadable texture, and place it in the center or in small dots over the plantain chips.
Step 3. Finish with a drizzle of honey on top and serve immediately as a sweet and savory snack to share.
